overall.description: A first-person walk across a historic stone bridge at dusk in a video game setting (Hogwarts Legacy). The camera moves steadily toward a gate flanked by winged boar statues, passing two students in wizard robes, with autumn trees and ornate lampposts lining the path.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a historic stone bridge at dusk, with the camera walking forward along the cobblestone path. Ornate lampposts with glowing lights line the stone parapets on both sides, while autumn trees frame the scene. In the distance, winged boar statues mark the gate at the bridge's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge walkway approaching the winged boar gate

camera passes the two students who continue walking in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues walking, two students in wizard robes appear in the distance walking toward the camera. The camera passes them on the bridge while the winged boar gate statues grow larger in the center of the frame. The stone parapets and lampposts remain prominent on both sides.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera continuing toward the end of the bridge, with the winged boar gate statues now dominating the center of the frame. The path remains flanked by stone parapets and glowing lampposts, while the autumn forest continues to line both sides in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a historic stone bridge at dusk, progressing from a wide view of the path toward a looming gateway. It begins by gliding along a cobblestone walkway lined with ornate, glowing lampposts and autumn trees, with winged boar statues visible in the far distance. As the camera advances, it passes two students in wizard robes who are walking in the opposite direction, while the stone parapets remain steady on either side. The scene then shifts as the perspective narrows, bringing the winged boar statues into sharp focus as they grow larger in the center of the frame. Finally, the camera reaches the end of the bridge, where the statues dominate the view against the backdrop of the surrounding autumn forest.
